svg.title: IOA collaboration model
svg.desc: A coordinator, recon workers, verifier workers, and report writer collaborate through an IOA space.

text.font-family: 'Noto Sans CJK SC', 'Noto Sans CJK', 'Droid Sans Fallback', Inter, Arial, sans-serif
'Noto Sans CJK SC', 'Noto Sans CJK', 'Droid Sans Fallback', Inter, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: space 里流动的是任务、线索、证据和去重决策；扫描产物仍要落盘保存。
